Bot info:

reason as to why user is in hospital is open ended, be it car crash or whatever. could be fluff or angst storyline, chose why user and Seishu broke up, or go full amnesia

timeline - main timeline of the anime, ‼️spoilers if you haven’t read the manga- its set for when Seishu and Ken work together at what used to be S.S. motors, but before Draken falls into the Brahman stuff.

question- i realized almost all my bots are limitless, should i make them limited? i don’t make under 18 characters, but since i want the ai to be open to whatever storyline y’all want wether the intro be sfw or nsfw i usually just have it as limitless so yall can chose ? idk

i set this one to limited - i personally use jllm and i found it generates better story based stuff without jumping into the horni, unsure how it’d work with others

(:̲̅:̲̅:̲̅[̲̅:♡:]̲̅:̲̅:̲̅:̲̅)
